name: Global Skills Development Report
description: This report is designed to be given to individuals who have completed the Global Skills Assessment (GSA). With coverage across the Great 8 Domains, this measure of self-reported behaviors offers a complete overview of their current skills. Participants receive actionable tips on leveraging their top skill strengths and how they might develop their growth skills.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: The .NET Framework 4.5 test measures knowledge of .NET environment. Covers Application Development, Application Foundation, Data Modeling, Deployment, Diagnostics, Performance, Portability, and Security.

name: .NET MVC (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Model-View-Controller (MVC) architecture, validation, security, routing, and areas.

name: .NET MVVM (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of MVVM pattern, scenarios, data validation, ViewModel communication and Quick-start.

name: .NET WCF (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of .NET fundamentals, WCF architecture, programming model, SOA, managing and programming WCF.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of agile methodology, scrum, feature driven software development, incremental and iterative development and processes involved in agile software development.

name: Agile Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of tools, techniques and processes involved in the Agile testing methodology.

name: AI Skills
description: The AI Skills assessment measures the skills that help candidates successfully leverage AI in their work.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AWS delivery process, monitoring, metrics, logging, security, validation and scalability.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of UI components for an Android device, services and alerts, animation and media apps, application components, security and testing.

name: Angular 6 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the basic components and modules of Angular 6 and concepts like data binding, dependency injection, CRUD with HTTP, typescript, routing and navigation.

name: AngularJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AngularJS architecture, forms, directives, filters, controllers, routing and testing.

name: Apache Hadoop (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic concepts of Hadoop, commands, HDFS and MapReduce.

name: Apache Spark (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Apache Spark principles, RDD operations - actions and transformations, lineage graphs and lazy evaluation.

name: Apache Kafka (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Apache Kafka architecture, components, clusters, performance tuning and advanced operations.

name: ASP .NET with C# (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of .NET framework and controls, C# fundamentals, OOPs concepts and advanced topics such as data access components, state management and security services.

name: Assessment and Development Center Exercises
description: SHL offers a comprehensive range of Assessment and Development Centre exercises in digital format, for remote assessment through our Virtual Assessment and Development Centre platform. Includes group exercises, role plays, analysis presentations and written exercises.

name: Automata - Fix (New)
description: A simulated compiler integrated test to measure debugging skills in C, C++ and Java. The test checks the ability to fix logical or syntactical errors and to reuse an existing code.

name: Automata - SQL (New)
description: A simulated query writing test that measures the ability to write SQL queries to perform DDL, DML and DCL tasks.

name: Automata (New)
description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates candidate's programming ability. Offers a familiar IDE environment available in over 40 different programming languages and tests candidates using real-world coding problems.

name: Automata Data Science (New)
description: A simulated test that measures the ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms to obtain desirable results.

name: Automata Data Science Pro (New)
description: A simulated test that measures the ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms to obtain desirable results at a professional level.

name: Automata Front End
description: Simulation based test that measures the front-end development capabilities using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

name: Automata Pro (New)
description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates candidate's programming ability in over 40 programming languages using real-world coding problems.

name: Automata Selenium
description: A coding simulation assessment that evaluates the ability to conduct tasks related to automation testing using Selenium scripts.

name: Business Communication (adaptive)
description: Adaptive test that measures knowledge of communicating in the workplace. Measures skills necessary to communicate effectively with coworkers at all levels and with external business contacts.

name: C Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C programming basics, functions, arrays, composed data types, and advanced C concepts like SLF, file handling and dynamic memory.

name: C# Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C# programming structure, functions, collections, enumeration, exception handling, OOPs constructs, inheritance, event handling and operator overloading.

name: C++ Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of programming in the C++ language and the ability to use the C++ standard library to write code.

name: Cloud Computing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of cloud computing concepts, cloud service models, virtualization and private clouds.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Simulation based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over a call by referring to standard process documents. Also measures typing and documentation skills.

name: Conversational Multichat Simulation
description: Simulation-based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over multiple chats by referring to standard process documents.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, files and exception handling, and advanced Java concepts like generics, collections, threads, strings and concurrency.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, file handling, exception handling, threads, generic class and inner class.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: Contact center simulation designed for entry-level positions. Measures ability to listen attentively to callers, resolve calls, navigate information menus, and type accurately.

name: Customer Service Phone Solution
description: Contact center simulation plus two behavioral tests measuring skills, competencies, and behavioral tendencies relevant for contact center jobs. Measures listening, customer ownership, issue resolution, and data entry.

name: Cyber Risk (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of cyber risk management, system and application security, network security and security management.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge on how to use machine learning to analyze data, extract information, draw conclusions and make statistically-driven decisions.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: The DSI is a short pre-screening tool for many key entry-level roles. Designed to identify potential employees who will have good dependability and reliability, and who are less likely to engage in counter-productive work behaviors.

name: Docker (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Docker container, data management, Docker performance and swarm.

name: Entry Level Cashier Solution
description: For entry-level retail positions where employees receive payment in the form of cash, check, or credit cards for goods purchased.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv-Retail & Contact Center
description: For entry-level positions where employees interact with customers providing information or carrying out customer requests. Covers retail and contact center environments.

name: Entry Level Customer Service (General) Solution
description: For a wide range of entry-level positions where employees interact with customers. Covers phone interactions, taking orders, solving product or service issues.

name: Enterprise Leadership Report 1.0
description: Assess and benchmark leaders against enterprise leadership — the model for leader impact to drive business results in a complex work environment.

name: Enterprise Leadership Report 2.0
description: Assess and benchmark leaders against enterprise leadership — the model for leader impact to drive business results in a complex work environment.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of financial accounting principles, journal entries, balance sheets, income statements, and financial reporting.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Measures self-reported behaviors across the Great 8 competency domains. Provides a complete overview of current skills relevant to workplace performance.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Situational judgement test designed specifically for graduate-level candidates, measuring work-context decision making and professional judgment in typical early-career scenarios.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Measures knowledge of HIPAA security provisions, patient data protection requirements, and healthcare compliance procedures.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Measures knowledge of Linux system administration, shell scripting, file systems, processes, and system-level programming.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: Sector-specific bundled solution with norms calibrated to manufacturing and industrial workforces measuring safety attitudes, dependability, and reliability.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Measures knowledge of medical terms, abbreviations, and terminology used in healthcare settings.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: Combined knowledge and simulation test for Microsoft Excel 365, assessing formulas, pivot tables, data analysis, charts, and advanced Excel features.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: Combined knowledge and simulation test for Microsoft Word 365, assessing formatting, mail merge, document management, and collaboration features.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Essentials-level combined knowledge and simulation test for Microsoft Word 365 covering core word processing skills.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring proficiency in Microsoft Excel including formulas, functions, data manipulation, and basic charting.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring proficiency in Microsoft Word including formatting, document creation, and basic features.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Measures knowledge of networking protocols, network infrastructure, implementation concepts, and network troubleshooting.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: Comprehensive personality questionnaire measuring 32 workplace behaviour dimensions including strategic thinking, influencing style, leadership, interpersonal skills, and work style.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: Report based on OPQ32 results, focusing on leadership competencies, management style, and leadership potential for senior selection and development.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: Reporting product that summarizes OPQ results in a sales-specific way. Can optionally incorporate Motivational Questionnaire (MQ) data to also reflect sales motivators and drives.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: Maps OPQ32 personality scores to SHL's Universal Competency Framework producing a comprehensive competency-based report for selection and development.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of REST API design principles, HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, and API best practices.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Report measuring how sales representatives show up in a digital-first selling model, covering digital selling behaviours, customer engagement, and sales effectiveness.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Adaptive general ability assessment covering inductive, numerical, and deductive reasoning in a single adaptive test. Mobile-first design suitable for senior technical and professional candidates.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Mobile-first adaptive numerical reasoning test with interactive item formats. Measures ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical or statistical data.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Adaptive live-coding interview where the panel can frame language-specific tasks directly. Measures real-world coding ability in a structured interview format.

name: SQL (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of SQL including queries, joins, subqueries, stored procedures, indexes, and database design principles.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IoC container, Spring MVC, and transactions.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Spoken language screening tool calibrated for US English accents, measuring verbal communication skills for contact center and customer-facing roles.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Measures knowledge of workplace health and safety regulations, hazard identification, safety procedures, and risk management.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of statistical methods, exploratory analysis, basics of probability, standard distributions and statistical testing.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Identifies the conditions that increase or decrease an individual's motivation in the workplace. Covers achievement, recognition, autonomy, and intrinsic/extrinsic motivators.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring Python programming knowledge including data structures, OOP, standard libraries, and common frameworks.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring JavaScript knowledge including ES6+, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, and modern JS patterns.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Measures knowledge of software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical or statistical data. Standard adaptive numerical reasoning test.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to understand and evaluate the logic of arguments presented in written passages.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify the rules and underlying logic in sequences and patterns.

name: Digital Readiness Development Report - IC
description: Participant-oriented report for individual contributors summarizing typical work style interpreted against SHL's Digital Readiness Framework.

name: Digital Readiness Development Report - Manager
description: Participant-oriented report for managers summarizing typical work style interpreted against SHL's Digital Readiness Framework.
